universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in Nebraska or Iowa with diabetes or hypertension, with SMS opt-in and not suppressed, currently active with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps, prioritized by conversion rate weight of 0.6
name: High-conversion preventive gap holders
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE m.address_id = a.address_id AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE m.member_id = mc.member_id AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE m.member_id = cp.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE m.member_id = sl.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE m.member_id = e.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE m.member_id = cg.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive')
rationale: This bucket targets members with open preventive care gaps, which are most predictive of conversion. They should receive urgent reminders about scheduling appointments to address these gaps.
suggested_treatment: Urgent SMS reminders about scheduling appointments to address open preventive care gaps.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members without open preventive care gaps and low-propensity members.

universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in Nebraska or Iowa with diabetes or hypertension, with SMS opt-in and not suppressed, currently active with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps, prioritized by conversion rate weight of 0.6
name: Engaged members with preventive gaps
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE m.address_id = a.address_id AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE m.member_id = mc.member_id AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE m.member_id = cp.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE m.member_id = sl.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE m.member_id = e.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE m.member_id = cg.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE m.member_id = se.member_id AND se.event_type = 'replied' AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days')
rationale: This bucket includes engaged members with open preventive care gaps. They should receive personalized SMS messages with additional information and support.
suggested_treatment: Personalized SMS messages with additional information and support for members with open preventive care gaps.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members without open preventive care gaps and low-propensity members.

universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in Nebraska or Iowa with diabetes or hypertension, with SMS opt-in and not suppressed, currently active with an active enrollment.
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps, prioritized by conversion rate weight of 0.6
name: High-propensity members without gaps
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE m.address_id = a.address_id AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE m.member_id = mc.member_id AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'i10%')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE m.member_id = cp.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE m.member_id = sl.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE m.member_id = e.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE m.member_id = cg.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.propensity_scores ps WHERE m.member_id = ps.member_id AND ps.model_name = 'appointment_scheduling' AND ps.decile >= 8)
rationale: This bucket includes high-propensity members without open preventive care gaps. They should receive proactive SMS messages about preventive care options.
suggested_treatment: Proactive SMS messages about preventive care options for high-propensity members without open gaps.
coverage_note: This bucket set covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members without open preventive care gaps and low-propensity members.
